batchManage.title: Batch Delete
batchManage.shiftClickHint: Hold Shift to select a range
batchManage.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected chat record(s)? This action cannot be undone.
batchManage.mergeHint: Select at least 2 chat records of the same chat type to merge
batchManage.mergeConfirmMessage: This will merge {count} selected chat records. The original records will be deleted and a new merged record will be created.
batchManage.mergeRiskWarning: Critical warning: this merge cannot be undone, and cross-platform context differences may cause semantic confusion. Please back up your original data before continuing.
